text: In the bushes of five Now they jingle hard as they fine Jingle bells, jingle bells, jingle bells Jingle bells joining jingle bells Dancing and friends and the jingle bells wearing the process Jingle bells It's a swell time To go riding in the one more slay Giddy up, jingle for the jingle jerky Jingle bells now There's a bright light of beat That's the jingle bell, that's the jingle bell That's the jingle bell ride
